category_sources: source_facts.description says ioctl is a command-line interface for interacting with the IoTeX blockchain; source_facts.repo points to the IoTeX core project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and executable are ioctl; IoTeX documentation and Go package metadata use ioctl for the CLI.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official IoTeX documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/iotexproject/iotex-core, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IoTeX blockchain CLI functionality; source_facts.repo is iotex-core and source_facts.homepage is official IoTeX docs.
